commands: bash -c 'ls -la /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/; echo ===FRONTEND===; ls -la /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/frontend/ || echo NO_FRONTEND_DIR; echo ===INFRA===; ls -la /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/infra/ || echo NO_INFRA_DIR; sed -i s/\\$\$$/\$/g /etc/nginx/sites-available/surf-ai; nginx -t > /tmp/nginx.log 2>&1 || true; cat /tmp/nginx.log; cat /etc/nginx/sites-available/surf-ai'
